scope: Turn the medium full-universe checkpoint and stop condition into a usable operator handoff and align the day-level docs to the actual end-of-day state

decision_context.prior_state: The repo had a validated medium portfolio checkpoint and a committed stop condition, but the day-level summary docs still described the pre-rerun plan rather than the actual March 24 end state.
decision_context.decision: Add one operator-facing handoff note for the medium checkpoint and update the day summary and tomorrow focus docs to reflect the completed validation, runtime stop condition, and current priority slices.
decision_context.why_now: Without this tranche, the canonical portfolio state is recoverable from artifacts but not obvious from the repo's top-level day documents.

files_expected.purpose: Summarizes the current canonical portfolio checkpoint, priority slices, and operating rules.
Captures why the operator handoff note and doc realignment were needed.
Appends the operator handoff tranche to the transparent change log.
Adds the operator handoff tranche to the day-level diff summary.
Updates the March 24 summary to include the completed portfolio rerun and stop condition.
Realigns the next-step plan around operator use of the medium checkpoint instead of the already-finished methodology tranche.

planned_steps: Extract the actual medium-checkpoint priority slices from the saved readout
Write a concise operator-facing handoff note for the canonical checkpoint
Update the day summary to reflect what was actually completed
Update the next-day focus doc so it starts from the current stop condition rather than the pre-rerun plan

expected_checks: The operator handoff note names the medium checkpoint as canonical and preserves its top slices correctly
The day summary no longer says that the full 515-domain rerun has not happened
The next-day focus no longer tells operators to rerun already-completed methodology tranches

guardrails: Do not present the medium checkpoint as a final trusted portfolio verdict
Do not re-open the rejected runtime experiment inside the docs
Keep dashboard and export refresh explicitly downstream of any future deeper rerun
